overall.description: A cinematic nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from an elevated overlook of neon-lit skyscrapers down to street level, following a pedestrian through covered walkways and urban streets with heavy neon lighting in teals and magentas.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city overlook with panoramic skyline views

events.description: clip opens on elevated platform overlooking neon cityscape
camera begins moving forward along the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: standing on an elevated platform overlooking the sprawling neon-lit cityscape, slowly panning across the skyline

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'ENDACHI' text on building facade
tall building covered in holographic advertisements and neon graphics
cluster of futuristic glass towers with neon lighting
concrete walkway with metal railings overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a sweeping view of a futuristic neon-lit cityscape at night. The camera stands on an elevated concrete platform overlooking towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, including a prominent 'ENDACHI' sign. The scene is dominated by cyan and magenta neon lighting against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: moving under the concrete overpass structure, sky becomes obscured
transition from neon-dominated to shadowed artificial lighting under the overpass

agents.ego_description: moving forward under the concrete overpass, descending toward street level while approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person wearing a purple jacket walking ahead on the green path

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and deck of elevated highway
painted green pedestrian and bicycle path with red markings
circular tower with red neon rings visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward under a massive concrete overpass structure, transitioning from the open skyline to a sheltered walkway. The green-painted bike lane becomes visible below as the camera approaches street level, following a distant pedestrian in a purple jacket. Red neon lights and street lamps illuminate the shadowed space under the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow bike lane under overpass with neon lighting

events.description: camera catches up to the pedestrian ahead, closing the distance
pedestrian stops walking to check phone by the railing

agents.ego_description: following the pedestrian in the purple jacket along the covered green walkway under the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket walking steadily ahead, occasionally looking at surroundings

entered.detail: low concrete wall separating walkway from drop
red traditional gate structure with neon accents

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the covered walkway, the camera follows the pedestrian in purple at a closer distance. The path is flanked by concrete barriers on the left and the open street on the right, passing under the elevated highway deck. The pedestrian walks steadily ahead through the artificially lit corridor with red neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with vehicle traffic and storefronts

events.description: exiting the covered walkway onto the open street level
moving into street area with active vehicle traffic
white convertible sports car passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: passing the pedestrian and moving along the street level, navigating around parked cars and crossing near moving traffic

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket stopped by railing, looking at phone
white convertible sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: wet asphalt street with vehicle traffic
row of parked futuristic vehicles along curb
metal dumpsters and trash bags on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a street-level urban environment with moving traffic. The camera passes the pedestrian who has stopped to check their phone, then continues along the sidewalk past parked cars and trash bins. A white convertible sports car drives past on the wet asphalt street as the camera navigates the city block.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sweeping aerial vista of a neon-lit skyline down into the gritty, street-level bustle of a cyberpunk city. It begins on an elevated concrete platform overlooking towering glass skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, where cyan and magenta lights dominate the dark night sky. As the camera moves forward, the open skyline gives way to the shadowed enclosure of a massive concrete overpass, shifting the lighting to red neon accents as it descends toward a green-painted bike lane. The scene then narrows into a sheltered walkway, following a pedestrian in a purple jacket through an artificially lit corridor flanked by concrete barriers. Finally, the camera exits the covered structure to open onto a wet urban street, passing the stopped pedestrian and parked cars as a white convertible sports car drives by on the asphalt.
